item.title: Ventec Life Systems, Inc.: VOCSN+Pro package, REF: PRT-00853-000; VOCSN+Pro unit, REF: PRT-00490-001 Recall
item.product: VOCSN+Pro package, REF: PRT-00853-000; VOCSN+Pro unit, REF: PRT-00490-001
item.summary: Respiratory system intended to provide continuous/intermittent ventilator support, may have a damaged back-up battery supporting backup alarm function, which may result in the backup alarm not activating during loss of primary power and absence/depletion of backup power sources, which may result in delayed caregiver awareness of a hazardous condition. Product details: VOCSN+Pro package, REF: PRT-00853-000; VOCSN+Pro unit, REF: PRT-00490-001
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the state of UT.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
